Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMNOVCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMNOVCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMNOVCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &NCMTipFil = nullvalue(&NCMTipFil) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de NCM' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWNCM', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'CheckSecurityForActions' Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' If (&Context.Old_Perfil = 3) &Update.Link = Ncm.Link(TrnMode.Update, NcmCod) &Update.Class = !'Attribute' Else &Update.Link = "" &Update.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &Delete = !'' If (&Context.Old_Perfil = 3) &Delete.Link = Ncm.Link(TrnMode.Delete, NcmCod) &Delete.Class = !'Attribute' Else &Delete.Link = "" &Delete.Class = !'Invisible' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Ncm.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(NcmCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSync' wbsSyncNCM.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNcmMonofasicos' wpNcmMonofasicos.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'CheckSecurityForActions' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not (&Context.Old_Perfil = 3) BtnInsert.Visible = False Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NcmNovCod1.Visible = False &NcmUnd1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmIniVig1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmFinVig1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMNOVCOD' &NcmNovCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMUND' &NcmUnd1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMINIVIG' TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmIniVig1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMFINVIG' TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmFinVig1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NcmNovCod2.Visible = False &NcmUnd2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmIniVig2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmFinVig2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMNOVCOD' &NcmNovCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMUND' &NcmUnd2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMINIVIG' TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmIniVig2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMFINVIG' TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmFinVig2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NcmNovCod3.Visible = False &NcmUnd3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmIniVig3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmFinVig3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMNOVCOD' &NcmNovCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMUND' &NcmUnd3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMINIVIG' TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmIniVig3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMFINVIG' TableMergedDynamicFiltersNcmFinVig3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMNOVCOD' &NcmNovCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMNOVCOD' &NcmNovCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NCMCOD" &NcmCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTERFULLTEXT" &FilterFullText.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"NCMTIPFIL" &NCMTipFil.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMNOVCOD' &NcmNovCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMUND' &NcmUnd1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMINIVIG' &NcmIniVig1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &NcmIniVig_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMFINVIG' &NcmFinVig1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &NcmFinVig_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NCMCOD", "", not &NcmCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &NcmCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTERFULLTEXT", "", not &FilterFullText.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilterFullText, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"NCMTIPFIL", "", not &NCMTipFil.IsEmpty(), 0, &NCMTipFil, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMNOVCOD' AND not &NcmNovCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmNovCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMUND' AND not &NcmUnd1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmUnd1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMINIVIG' AND not (&NcmIniVig1.IsEmpty() AND &NcmIniVig_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmIniVig1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &NcmIniVig_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'NCMFINVIG' AND not (&NcmFinVig1.IsEmpty() AND &NcmFinVig_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmFinVig1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &NcmFinVig_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMNOVCOD' AND not &NcmNovCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmNovCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMUND' AND not &NcmUnd2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmUnd2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMINIVIG' AND not (&NcmIniVig2.IsEmpty() AND &NcmIniVig_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmIniVig2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &NcmIniVig_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'NCMFINVIG' AND not (&NcmFinVig2.IsEmpty() AND &NcmFinVig_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmFinVig2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &NcmFinVig_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMNOVCOD' AND not &NcmNovCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmNovCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMUND' AND not &NcmUnd3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmUnd3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMINIVIG' AND not (&NcmIniVig3.IsEmpty() AND &NcmIniVig_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmIniVig3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &NcmIniVig_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'NCMFINVIG' AND not (&NcmFinVig3.IsEmpty() AND &NcmFinVig_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &NcmFinVig3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &NcmFinVig_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Ncm" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
